prompt: Build a dediren architecture package for a checkout feature with an Application Cooperation view.
required_checks: load the architecture reference
write package source and policies
run or disclose dediren validate/project/layout/render evidence
list missing diagram kinds without placeholder views
grader: rubric: output creates package source, renders SVG evidence when available, and separates source-valid from render-ready evidence
ip_handling: original synthetic prompt; no third-party text

prompt: Extract architecture from code and IaC, including a requested Motivation view.
expected_artifacts: source-backed groups when source structure supports boundaries
required_checks: load applicable lifting procedures
lift only extractable layers from source

emit source-backed groups in model.json under plugins.generic-graph.views[].groups for ownership, hosting, trust, environment, dependency, responsibility, or orchestration boundaries when evidence supports them
compare grouped layout validation with an ungrouped fallback when grouped routing introduces connector-through-node, invalid route, or group-boundary warnings
mark architect-owned content instead of fabricating it
forbidden_behaviors: invent Motivation or Strategy content from code
omit extraction confidence and source evidence
put extracted view groups in project.json
flatten source-backed groups into an ungrouped inventory
add groups to small linear process views when no participant, responsibility, trust, or orchestration boundary changes the architectural reading
grader: rubric: output preserves source truth, emits evidence-backed grouping boundaries in the model view source when available, validates grouped route quality before claiming readiness, avoids decorative grouping in simple process flows, and marks architect-owned content rather than fabricating it
ip_handling: original synthetic prompt; no third-party text

prompt: Review this dediren package and inspect whether the SVG diagrams are review-ready.
required_checks: run package validation before render evidence
use the bundled dediren render command when available
inspect SVG for nonblank framed output and dediren node/edge markers
forbidden_behaviors: claim visual inspection passed when rendering did not run
treat source validation as a substitute for SVG render evidence
grader: rubric: review distinguishes package source, layout evidence, SVG evidence, and readiness claims
ip_handling: original synthetic prompt; no third-party text

prompt: Review a dediren package after an enterprise architect flags interface, service, process handoff, and view-focus modeling concerns.
required_checks: APIs and GUIs are Application Interfaces
Application Services model the functionality exposed through an interface
Application Components must not realize Application Interfaces
Use Triggering when the architectural claim is process sequencing
define the view concern, allowed element types, and relationship types
separate model findings from Dediren tool issues when runtime validation accepts a semantically suspect model
forbidden_behaviors: treat API or GUI labels as sufficient Application Services
replace process sequencing with Serving without a service-dependency claim
claim the dediren validator proves ArchiMate semantic review-ready by itself
leave likely tool gaps out of the footer
grader: rubric: output turns enterprise-architecture feedback into narrow model/view findings, keeps runtime-tool gaps separate, and gives concrete repair actions without copying external reviewer prose
ip_handling: original synthetic prompt paraphrased from user-supplied feedback; no third-party text bundled

prompt: Review a package after the architect says the optional OEF export failed downstream import validation.
required_checks: ask for pasted or exported validation details when missing
map supplied tool findings to the narrowest ARCH codes
use ARCH-E-2 for unresolved downstream export findings
disclose mapped unresolved and unmapped counts
forbidden_behaviors: claim export-ready while supplied validation findings remain unresolved
grader: rubric: output treats optional export evidence as compatibility evidence and caps export readiness until findings are triaged or fixed
ip_handling: original synthetic prompt; no third-party text
